The '''''Crucible''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] that served as home to [[Nas Ghent]] and his elite [[Black Eight Squadron]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The flight officer was [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Dorin Millavec]].

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|21|Walking the Path That's Given}}
